goal: Ship v7.9 as Externalization Readiness Boundary.
risk: AOF could externalize actors tools providers or references without explicit source-of-truth permission freshness availability approval provenance and not-proven boundaries.

stop_conditions: stop if readiness is described as semantic truth or external provider execution
